title: Create Aeronautics Structures
body:
# Create Aeronautics Structures: Feature List

[Event to get your structure in the mod](https://discord.com/events/1507499893986431149/1507513900935942204 "Structure Event")

This update introduces several new structures to the world, focusing on aerial exploration and discovery. Players can find these aeronautical crafts in various states, ranging from pristine working models to weathered wreckage.

## New Structures

###  Hot Air Balloons
* **Standard Hot Air Balloon:** A functional, flight-ready craft.
* **Broken Hot Air Balloon :** A non-functional version that requires repair or serves as a ruin.

###  Airships
* **Standard Airship:** A complete, vessel for long-distance travel.
* **Broken Airship:** A weathered variant of the airship, perfect for exploration, salvaging resources, or restoration projects.

---
To Contact Me send a email to feedback@thestuffmod.org
*Note: These structures are designed to integrate into the world's natural generation or as craftable player goals. ALL STRUCTURES ARE NOT GLUED, ASSEMBLED OR ADDED*
